PAR SEC

flat-faceted procedural space golf · tap to play

THE GAME

▶ Play — desktop / landscape
the full tour, all systems
 ▶ Play in PORTRAIT — mobile beta
phone-first: snackable holes, 3-planet on-ramp

PROTOTYPES

Golf Orbit — whole planet + auto-golf Golf Orbit — mega-drive Soft-body planet — jelly ball + morph Super Stickman — 10-level campaign
[ and ] switch levels
 Aesthetics explorer — 12 looks
keys 1-9 / 0 / - / =
 Talking golf ball — local LLM
full voice needs WebGPU + mic
